title: Operation params registry row — one TSV row in operation_params_registry.tsv
description: Flat catalogue row, one per parameter bundle. The full params dict (whose shape depends on operation_type) lives in operation_params_v1 JSON; the TSV row carries the top-line identity + a flat JSON-string of params for grep-ability. definition_path points at the JSON for readers who want the structured form.

params_json.description: Canonical JSON of the params object (sorted keys, no whitespace). For grep-ability.
